column1: # This is the template file for creating symbols with tragesym
# every line starting with '#' is a comment line.
# Generated for Nordic Semiconductor NRF9151-LACA-R / nRF9151-LACA.
# Pin names and assignments based on nRF9151 Product Specification v1.1
# - RESERVED_31..33 are the special thermally/mechanically connected pads that
#   Nordic says to leave electrically unconnected.
# - RF pins ANT, AUX and GPS are typed as passive in this symbol.
# wordswap swaps labels if the pin is on the right side an looks like this:
#   "PB1 (CLK)". That's useful for micro controller port labels
# rotate_labels rotates the pintext of top and bottom pins
#   this is useful for large symbols like FPGAs with more than 100 pins
# sort_labels will sort the pins by it's labels
# name will be printed in the top of the symbol
# name is only some graphical text, not an attribute
# if you have a device with slots, you'll have to use slot= and slotdef=
# use comment= if there are special information you want to add
description=Nordic nRF9151 low power cellular IoT / DECT NR+ SiP, LGA package
#comment=Check Nordic nRF9151 hardware design guidelines before PCB layout.
#comment=Reserved pins must follow Nordic connection guidance.
